summary: Comprehensive testing of Endorsement Portal with new fields (Employee ID, DOB, Age, Gender, Date of Joining, Coverage Type, Sum Insured). Backend: 14/14 tests passed. Frontend: All pages working correctly.

minor.issue: Fixed - Old endorsements without submitted_by field caused 500 error. Made submitted_by optional to handle legacy data.

critical_code_review_comments: Legacy data migration: Old endorsements imported before the new fields were added don't have submitted_by field. Fixed by making it optional.
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Made submitted_by field optional to handle legacy data
seed_data_creation: Test endorsements created during testing with new fields (Employee ID, DOB, Age, Gender, etc.)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new fields are working correctly. Excel template has 19 columns, export has 26 columns. Legacy data without submitted_by field is handled gracefully.

login_flow.hr_login: PASS - HR user can login and access HR Portal
login_flow.admin_login: PASS - Admin user can login and access Admin Portal

submit_endorsement_form.new_fields_present: PASS - All new fields visible: Employee ID, DOB, Age, Gender, Date of Joining, Coverage Type, Sum Insured
submit_endorsement_form.form_submission: PASS - Endorsements created with all new fields saved correctly

excel_template_download.template_columns: PASS - Template has 19 columns including Employee ID

my_endorsements_page.coverage_column: PASS - Coverage column displayed with sum insured values

admin_approval_workflow.pending_approvals_page: PASS - Shows Employee ID and Coverage columns
admin_approval_workflow.approve_endorsement: PASS - Approval dialog works, endorsement approved successfully

download_approved_excel.export_columns: PASS - Export has 26 columns including all new fields

bug_fixed.issue: Admin GET /api/endorsements returning 500 Internal Server Error
bug_fixed.root_cause: Old endorsements imported before new fields were added didn't have submitted_by field. Pydantic model required this field.
bug_fixed.fix_applied: Made submitted_by field Optional[str] = None in Endorsement model
